sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49294" key="quhle/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θῠ-ηλέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n49294.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θυλέομαι</ref></xr>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
